source: Hand-listed 6-bar close/volume series exercising up/down/unchanged transitions. Expected values computed by an independent, from-spec reference implementation (scratchpad/gen_golden_p1b45.py, ref_obv): obv[0]=0.0; obv[i]=obv[i-1]+vol[i] if close rises, -vol[i] if it falls, unchanged if flat -- per SPRINT-P1B-indicators.md addendum, NOT by running tradekit's stub.
